frames.caption: Pick the last element as the pivot (3, coral). Everything else will be compared to it.
2 is smaller than pivot 3, so it swapped with 5 into the left zone. Now scanning 8.
1 also swapped into the left zone. Scan done: 2 and 1 sit left of where the pivot will land.
Pivot 3 swapped with 5 into index 2 — its final position. Left [2, 1] and right [5, 8, 9] recurse next.
